title: Which EU countries offer financial incentives to blood donors?
subtitle: European member states offer a variety of monetary perks to motivate people to donate blood and blood components.
textNote: The report used for this visualization can be found on page 61 under the given link.
extraInfo_BG: Monetary incentives: compensation for donor's direct costs; cash payment.
extraInfo_HR: Monetary incentives: subsidised public transportation; health insurance benefits.
extraInfo_CZ: Monetary incentives: tax relief; health insurance benefits.
